'''Poptree Forest''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] on the jungle planet [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[Battle of Poptree Forest|battle]] occurred there that went badly for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="MedStar I" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
